steps.title: Use the bridge context
steps.content: The old Riverton bridge is supported by massive sandstone pillars. In an architectural context, pillars physically bear the weight of a bridge and keep it standing.

steps.title: Reject nonphysical meanings
steps.content: A means nurtured or cared for, B means endorsed or approved, and D means improved on. None describes what pillars do to a bridge. The needed meaning is physically held up. The answer is C.
